rationale.R1.1: The artifact's framing is internally broken: it introduces QMaster as 'value-based' but describes a pure policy-gradient algorithm (REINFORCE + baseline), with no Q-function estimation anywhere in the procedure. Conceptual reconstruction is required to make the thesis coherent regardless of interpretation.
rationale.R1.2: Load-bearing. The value-based framing and the REINFORCE implementation are logically incompatible — the key insight ('explicit estimation of the action-value function') is never instantiated. This inconsistency propagates through the conclusion. Fixing it is necessary for the artifact to be coherent at all.
